verification.note: Reported by the ORACLE authors (Sankhe, Rajendran, Belgiovine, Chowdhury, Ioannidis, 'ORACLE: Optimized Radio clAssification through Convolutional neuraL nEtworks', IEEE INFOCOM 2019, arXiv:1812.01124), NOT reproduced or re-run by this repo. The 0.986 is the paper's closed-set 16-transmitter rank-1 accuracy on the SINGLE static-location experiment (Fig. 6a), raw-IQ window=128, same dataset family + input as our committed split sei-oracle-closedset-strat-tx-8010-seed42-v1. from_paper_UNCERTAIN: the paper's number is a single-location split with a fixed 200K/10K/50K per-device sizing, whereas our canonical split pools all distance folders 80/10/10 stratified-by-tx with a 1024-windows/capture cap -- same dataset, different split/protocol, indices unpublished. A faithful in-repo oracle_cnn run on our split (self_reported) is landing separately and must not be conflated with this literature figure.
